title: Hypothesis Testing for Large Samples (n > 30) Flowchart
description: A step-by-step decision-making process for conducting a z-test of significance on a large sample.
elements: Make Decision: Reject H₀ / Fail to Reject H₀
relationships: Sequential flow from stating hypotheses to drawing a final conclusion, with a decision branch based on comparing the calculated z-score to the critical value from the standard normal distribution.
